name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your prompt that you'd like me to cop...
  Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your prompt that you'd like me to cop...
assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.\n\nCould you please provide:\nThe message/text you want to copy\nWhat you'd like me to do with it (analyze, format, store in a file, etc.)\n\nI'm here to assist with whatever you need!" == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.\nCould you please provide:\nThe message/text you want to copy\nWhat you'd like me to do with it (analyze, format, store in a file, etc.)\nI'm here to assist with whatever you need!"
  
    I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.
  + 
    Could you please provide:
    The message/text you want to copy
    What you'd like me to do with it (analyze, format, store in a file, etc.)
  + 
    I'm here to assist with whatever you need!
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:213: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
E   AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
E     Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your prompt that you'd like me to cop...
E     Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your prompt that you'd like me to cop...
E   assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.\n\nCould you please provide:\nThe message/text you want to copy\nWhat you'd like me to do with it (analyze, format, store in a file, etc.)\n\nI'm here to assist with whatever you need!" == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.\nCould you please provide:\nThe message/text you want to copy\nWhat you'd like me to do with it (analyze, format, store in a file, etc.)\nI'm here to assist with whatever you need!"
E     
E       I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message content in your prompt that you'd like me to copy or work with.
E     + 
E       Could you please provide:
E       The message/text you want to copy
E       What you'd like me to do with it (analyze, format, store in a file, etc.)
